g.text: How does the extension discover skills installed across 11 different AI agents?
Result: TreeView sidebar shows each skill once with agent badges (e.g. "Claude, Cursor, Copilot")
different AI agents. Each stores skills in
its own folder — global and per-project.
Solution: We maintain a list of all 11
agents and scan both scopes for each.
Problem: Skills are installed as symlinks,
but Node.js says symlinks aren't folders.
A naive scan would miss every skill.
Solution: A helper checks "is this a
symlink?" first, then follows it to see if
the target is a real folder. Two-step
check that works on all platforms.
Problem: The same skill is symlinked
Solution: Group by folder name. Show
the skill once with badges listing which
